title: Login Page
description: Secure authentication entry point for staff and vendors, showing the system brand, credentials form, and access flow.

title: Vendor Registration Form
description: Public vendor onboarding form used to collect business and identity details before review and approval.

title: Admin Command Dashboard
description: Enterprise overview for system-wide oversight, compliance activity, payments, user counts, and operational intelligence.

title: Enterprise Navigation Menu
description: Global dashboard shell with grouped operational navigation, compact topbar, and insights rail for administrative workflows.

title: User Management Overview
description: Admin-controlled user administration module with staff, officials, vendors, roles, permissions, and activity logs.

title: Invite and Assign Role Form
description: Controlled staff onboarding workflow where an admin creates a manager or official, assigns scope, and prepares invite credentials.

title: Roles and Permissions Matrix
description: Role-based access control screen showing permission scopes instead of hardcoded dashboard access.

title: Reports and Analytics
description: Analytics workspace for revenue, occupancy, compliance, and operational performance reporting.

title: Billing Configuration
description: Administrative billing screen for utility charge types, tariff setup, and financial configuration.

title: Notification Preferences
description: Configuration page for notification channels and communication preferences used by system users.

title: Manager Dashboard
description: Coordination workspace for market supervisors, showing approvals, staff activity, vendors, and operating priorities.

title: Vendor Review Workflow
description: Manager workflow for reviewing vendor applications, approval status, documentation, and follow-up actions.

title: Stall Data Entry Form
description: Operational data entry form for creating or updating a market stall with realistic location and rental information.

title: Coordination Workflow
description: Internal coordination screen for operational messages, assignments, and cross-role workflow tracking.

title: Official Oversight Dashboard
description: Government operations console for inspections, complaints, compliance actions, and regional market oversight.

title: Inspection Audit Workflow
description: Official audit workflow for inspection history, compliance review, and traceable operational activity.

title: Vendor Operations Dashboard
description: Vendor self-service workspace for sales context, payments, applications, and business activity.

title: Complaint Data Entry Form
description: Vendor-facing issue reporting workflow with clear fields for operational complaints and service requests.

title: Vendor Payments Workspace
description: Vendor payment screen showing invoices, settlement status, and financial self-service actions.

title: Mobile Vendor Dashboard
description: Responsive mobile view of the vendor dashboard with readable metrics, compact navigation, and prioritized actions.

title: Mobile Navigation Menu
description: Responsive mobile shell showing the collapsible enterprise navigation menu and grouped administrative modules.
